suggested_titles.title: Stratified Horizon
suggested_titles.subtitle: A dance of deep blues and earthy ochres, structured by geometric precision and organic flow.
suggested_titles.description: An abstract exploration of layered forms and chromatic depth, evoking landscapes of mind and matter.

suggested_titles.title: Urban Blueprint
suggested_titles.subtitle: Dynamic lines and bold color fields map out a compelling internal architecture.
suggested_titles.description: This piece reinterprets the essence of a cityscape through a compelling interplay of shape and vibrant contrast.

suggested_titles.title: Chromatic Depths
suggested_titles.subtitle: An intricate composition where rich blues and warm browns meet sharp accents of red and yellow.
suggested_titles.description: A visually dense and contemplative work, revealing hidden geometries and an atmospheric sense of place.

contextual_proposals.context_role: To present the artwork in a highly refined and architectural contemporary setting, emphasizing its scale, sophisticated palette, and structural integrity through a dramatic, low-angle perspective.
contextual_proposals.space_type: Contemporary gallery hall with clean architectural lines.
contextual_proposals.atmosphere: Serene, architectural, and contemplative, with an emphasis on spatial depth and understated elegance. The cool, calm environment allows the artwork's vibrant colors to resonate.
materials: Matte off-white mineral wall with subtle texture
contextual_proposals.lighting: Soft, diffused gallery daylight from an unseen high source, creating gentle ambient light, supplemented by cool-toned, focused track lighting subtly accentuating the artwork's surface texture and depth.
contextual_proposals.camera_view: Nadir Controlado: Camera is positioned very low, near the floor, approximately 20-35 cm from the ground, using a controlled nadir-inspired architectural viewpoint. The floor plane, wall height, ceiling lines, columns, door frames or architectural verticals may rise strongly in the composition. Use a controlled oblique angle across the room, not a straight-on product view, with one coherent vanishing direction for architecture and artwork. Use the nadir effect mainly through the surrounding room geometry: floor lines, vertical wall planes, ceiling height, architectural edges, columns, furniture legs or door frames. The artwork remains the visual subject, but the dramatic low viewpoint is carried by the architecture rather than by warping the canvas.
contextual_proposals.camera_distance: Controlled architectural distance, allowing the artwork to dominate the central frame while clearly showcasing the spatial depth and rising architectural elements of the gallery.
contextual_proposals.camera_angle_notes: The extremely low camera position dramatically accentuates the artwork's imposing verticality and solid presence, creating a powerful upward visual pull. Architectural lines from the floor and walls converge towards the top of the frame, grounding the artwork within a grander, yet restrained, spatial context without distorting the artwork's own planar integrity. This view highlights the artwork as a monumental, central anchor.
contextual_proposals.human_presence: No visible people or animals. Human context expressed through architecture, culture, objects, season, and refined interior atmosphere.
contextual_proposals.curatorial_reason: The artwork's abstract composition, with its interplay of strong geometric forms and organic lines, finds a perfect counterpart in the clean, unornamented architecture of a minimalist gallery. The cool, neutral palette of the environment allows the deep blues, rich browns, and vibrant red/yellow accents of the artwork to truly sing, while the low camera angle mirrors the artwork's internal spatial tension and elevates its perceived gravitas.
contextual_proposals.commercial_reason: This setup presents the artwork in a highly coveted, premium commercial context, appealing to discerning collectors and designers furnishing modern architectural spaces. The dramatic, unique camera angle adds significant visual impact and memorable appeal, showcasing the artwork's potential as a profound statement piece capable of anchoring a sophisticated interior. It highlights the artwork's inherent quality without distraction.
contextual_proposals.mockup_prompt: A large abstract artwork, exactly as provided, vertical orientation, mounted centered and slightly elevated on a clean matte off-white mineral wall with subtle texture, within a calm, minimal contemporary gallery. The floor is polished light grey concrete, extending prominently into the foreground. The camera is positioned very low, just above the concrete floor, looking slightly upwards and across the room at an oblique angle, creating strong, coherent vanishing lines from the floor and architectural walls that rise towards the upper frame. Discreet, cool-toned track lighting casts a soft, focused illumination on the artwork, highlighting its surface texture. The scene maintains a neutral-to-cool material temperature and restrained commercial clarity. Artwork is the primary focus, physically plausible, and appears as a real stretched canvas. No people, no animals.

The floor plane, wall height, ceiling lines, columns, door frames or architectural verticals may rise strongly in the composition. Use a controlled oblique angle across the room, not a straight-on product view, with one coherent vanishing direction for architecture and artwork. Use the nadir effect mainly through the surrounding room geometry: floor lines, vertical wall planes, ceiling height, architectural edges, columns, furniture legs or door frames. The artwork remains the visual subject, but the dramatic low viewpoint is carried by the architecture rather than by warping the canvas.

contextual_proposals.context_role: To highlight the artwork's contemplative depth and sophisticated palette within a refined, intimate domestic setting, emphasizing its role as a prized cultural object.
contextual_proposals.space_type: Private Collector's Study / Quiet Living Room
contextual_proposals.atmosphere: Intimate, contemplative, cultured, and silent, enveloped in a soft evening glow that encourages focused appreciation. A sense of history and collected taste pervades the space.
materials: Hand-knotted wool rug in deep indigo or charcoal
Aged deep brown leather club chair
contextual_proposals.lighting: Soft evening light from a hidden source, gently washing the wall, complemented by subtle, focused gallery track lighting illuminating the artwork to enhance its texture and colors.
contextual_proposals.camera_view: Contrapicado 7/8: Camera height is low, below normal knee height, with the viewpoint grounded close to the floor but still architectural. Use a 7/8 oblique rotation so the wall, artwork depth, and room volume are visible through one shared perspective. The artwork is seen with strong side depth and believable thickness; use clear asymmetry and negative space toward the vanishing side while keeping surrounding wall and floor aligned to the same camera.
contextual_proposals.camera_distance: Controlled architectural distance. The artwork is dominant, but the surrounding architecture, floor planes, and foreground elements are clearly visible, rising into the frame, providing spatial context.
contextual_proposals.camera_angle_notes: The low, upward-tilted camera view from a 7/8 oblique angle accentuates the artwork's vertical presence and physical thickness, making it appear monumental and central. It creates a sense of reverence, allowing the refined floor and base of the wall to extend into the frame, providing spatial grounding. The asymmetry highlights the room's depth and the artwork's integration within the collector's space.
contextual_proposals.human_presence: No visible people or animals. Human context expressed through architecture, culture, objects, season, and refined interior atmosphere.
contextual_proposals.curatorial_reason: The artwork's deep, rich color palette (indigo blues, earthy browns, accent reds and yellows) finds a sophisticated resonance with the proposed warm, muted, and earthy domestic collector's environment. The textured limewash wall and dark oak flooring provide a material dialogue that complements the artwork's painterly texture and abstract geological feel. The quiet, contemplative atmosphere encourages focused appreciation, positioning the artwork as a significant cultural piece rather than mere decoration. The balance of modern abstraction with classic, understated collector furniture suggests a discerning eye for art and design.
contextual_proposals.commercial_reason: This setting positions the artwork as a high-value, collectible piece suitable for an art-literate and affluent audience. The intimate, refined home context demonstrates how the artwork can anchor a sophisticated living space, appealing to buyers who value art as a central element of their cultivated domestic environment. The dramatic camera view adds importance and presence, elevating the artwork's perceived value and desirability in the market.
contextual_proposals.mockup_prompt: A large, vertically oriented abstract canvas, featuring deep blues, earthy browns, and accent reds and yellows with visible texture, is mounted prominently on a wall in a cultivated private collector's living room. The wall is finished in a warm, muted limewash plaster, offering subtle texture. The floor is dark, wide-plank oak, partially covered by a quiet, hand-knotted wool rug in a deep indigo. A low, elegant dark wood console table is partially cropped in the foreground, adorned with one or two understated, handcrafted ceramic objects. A classic collector's armchair, upholstered in aged deep brown leather, is positioned obliquely in the mid-ground, suggesting a quiet viewing spot. The camera is low, below knee height, looking up with a controlled upward tilt, at a 7/8 oblique angle, emphasizing the artwork's verticality and physical depth, showing clear asymmetry, and architectural lines rising from the floor. Soft evening light casts a contemplative glow, with focused track lighting subtly illuminating the artwork's texture and colors. The atmosphere is intimate, silent, and culturally rich, establishing the artwork as the undisputed cultural center of the home. No visible people, no animals.

contextual_proposals.context_role: To present the artwork in an aspirational, sophisticated domestic setting that enhances its quiet power and material quality through refined natural light and architectural depth.
contextual_proposals.atmosphere: Serene, sophisticated, and bathed in a tranquil, golden afternoon light, reflecting refined taste and quiet luxury. The air is calm and collected, with a subtle warmth.
materials: Limewashed walls in a warm, muted 'greige' or pale sand tone
Wide-plank pale oak flooring with a subtle matte finish
A low, minimalist console table in fumed oak or brushed bronze with clean lines
Sheer, fine linen curtains diffusing window light
Textured natural fiber rug in a complementary neutral tone (e.g., undyed wool, jute)
contextual_proposals.lighting: Soft, filtered afternoon sunlight streaming in from a large, elegant window (implied off-camera or partially visible), casting subtle golden reflections and highlighting the artwork's textured surface. The room has balanced ambient light, creating depth without harsh shadows.
contextual_proposals.camera_view: Reflejo Dorado de Tarde / Palazzo: Camera height is elegant human standing height, approximately 150-170 cm, as if observed calmly from inside a palazzo room. Use a soft three-quarter rotation that catches reflected late light while keeping the artwork plane legible. The composition is stable, warm, and architectural, with golden afternoon reflection supporting the room rather than repainting the artwork; keep elegant balance but avoid perfect symmetry unless the room itself naturally demands it.
contextual_proposals.camera_distance: Controlled architectural distance, allowing the artwork to be the clear focal point while revealing the elegant spatial context and material richness of the room.
contextual_proposals.camera_angle_notes: The soft three-quarter view emphasizes the physical presence of the artwork and the depth of the room. The elegant standing height perspective creates a natural, contemplative viewing experience, and the subtle angle prevents a flat presentation, revealing the canvas's thickness and integration into the space.
contextual_proposals.human_presence: No visible people or animals. Human context expressed through architecture, culture, objects, season, and refined interior atmosphere.
contextual_proposals.curatorial_reason: The artwork's deep blues and warm earthy tones are beautifully complemented by the soft, golden light and warm neutral palette of this quiet luxury setting. The refined architectural language provides a sophisticated backdrop that enhances the artwork's contemporary abstract nature without competing, allowing its colors and forms to resonate with the room's serene elegance. The dark blue in the artwork finds a subtle echo in the overall calming atmosphere, while the reds and yellows provide essential moments of contrast against the room's restrained palette.
contextual_proposals.commercial_reason: This context positions the artwork as a premium, sophisticated statement piece suitable for discerning collectors of modern art. The 'quiet luxury' aesthetic is highly desirable in current markets, suggesting high-end residential placement. The warm, natural lighting and refined materials create an inviting, aspirational image that allows potential buyers to envision the artwork enriching their own elegant domestic spaces. The architectural depth created by the camera reinforces the artwork's physical quality and value.

contextual_proposals.context_role: To showcase the artwork's contemporary sophistication within a historically rich, yet restrained, European setting, appealing to collectors who appreciate layered aesthetics and architectural grandeur.
contextual_proposals.space_type: Refined gallery hall within a historic European palazzo.
contextual_proposals.atmosphere: Serene, sophisticated, rich, and contemplative. The late afternoon golden light filtering into a spacious, high-ceilinged room creates a quiet grandeur, where history meets contemporary art.
materials: Aged limewash walls in a warm, muted cream
Polished terrazzo floor with an intricate pattern in warm, pale tones
Tall arched windows with light, flowing linen drapes
contextual_proposals.lighting: Golden late-day light, soft and directional, filtering through tall arched windows, casting long, elegant shadows and bathing the room in a warm, diffused glow, with subtle illumination on the artwork.
contextual_proposals.camera_view: Vista Aérea con Contexto de Ventanas: Camera height is elevated above normal eye level, high enough to read the room, windows, floor plane, and artwork together. Use a gentle diagonal rotation so window context and the artwork wall are both visible without splitting perspectives. The room is comprehensible from above, with window light and floor geometry giving context while the artwork remains identifiable; allow a moderate offset so floor, windows, and surrounding architecture carry part of the frame.
contextual_proposals.camera_angle_notes: The elevated, high-angle view provides an expansive sense of the grand palazzo space, allowing the artwork's geometric abstraction to visually connect with the architectural lines of the floor and walls. The slight diagonal rotation ensures both the artwork's prominence and the room's context (windows, floor patterns) are clearly visible, creating a sophisticated spatial composition that enhances the artwork's presence and its potential for display in architecturally significant homes.
contextual_proposals.human_presence: No visible people or animals. Human context expressed through architecture, culture, objects, season, and refined interior atmosphere.
contextual_proposals.curatorial_reason: The artwork's deep, rich colors and strong, abstract forms find a sophisticated counterpoint in the warm, historical palette and restrained grandeur of a European palazzo. The interplay of contemporary abstraction against classical architecture highlights the artwork's timeless appeal and versatility. The golden late light brings out the subtle textures and tonal shifts in the painting.
contextual_proposals.commercial_reason: This setting appeals to a discerning market segment that values art within culturally significant, architecturally rich environments. It positions the artwork as a sophisticated addition to a premium collection, demonstrating its ability to elevate and integrate into a historically refined space. The elevated camera view showcases the artwork's scale and presence within a grand setting, suggesting its suitability for large, distinguished residences.
contextual_proposals.mockup_prompt: A large, abstract artwork featuring deep blues, browns, reds, and geometric shapes is hung prominently on an aged limewash wall in a grand European palazzo gallery. The room has tall proportions, subtle classical plaster mouldings, and a polished terrazzo floor with an intricate pattern. Tall arched windows with light linen drapes allow golden late-day light to stream in, casting soft, warm hues and elegant shadows across the room and subtly illuminating the artwork. A minimalist dark bronze console table is positioned against the wall, creating a foreground element. The camera is elevated above normal eye level, high enough to read the entire room, including the windows, the patterned floor plane, and the artwork together. The view uses a gentle diagonal rotation so both the window context and the artwork wall are visible without splitting perspectives. The room's architecture, furniture, and floor geometry are clearly comprehensible from this high-angle perspective, with the artwork remaining the identifiable central subject. The artwork is presented as a real physical canvas with visible thickness, not a flat image. No visible people or animals.

contextual_proposals.context_role: To ground the abstract artwork in a premium, authentic creative environment, emphasizing its artisanal quality and significant presence through dynamic spatial context.
contextual_proposals.space_type: Clean Artist's Studio Hallway / Gallery Corridor
contextual_proposals.atmosphere: Quiet, refined, contemplative studio environment with natural light and a sense of depth. Neutral-to-warm material palette.
materials: Light greige painted plaster wall with subtle texture
Subtle exposed ceiling beams or light tracks
Minimalist dark wood or metal studio furniture (e.g., a stool or rolling cart) in the background
Large, narrow window with simple framing
contextual_proposals.lighting: Soft, diffused north light entering from a side window, creating gentle, elongated shadows and highlighting wall textures. Overall soft studio daylight, avoiding harsh contrasts.
contextual_proposals.camera_view: Pasillo, Obra Descentrada y Próxima: Camera height is natural standing or slightly lowered human height, close enough to feel the corridor edge. Use an offset three-quarter corridor angle, with the artwork deliberately off-center and close rather than symmetrically framed. Place the artwork on a long wall plane rather than a short frontal display wall. The wall should extend laterally into the scene like a gallery passage, corridor, or elongated architectural plane, creating a clear vanishing direction. Use floor lines, ceiling lines, wall joints, lighting tracks, windows, columns, doorways, or distant wall planes to reinforce depth. The artwork may sit off-center and relatively close to the viewer, while the architecture recedes naturally to one side. Avoid product-style centered symmetry.
contextual_proposals.camera_distance: Medium-close, allowing for detailed view of the artwork and its immediate surroundings while establishing architectural depth.
contextual_proposals.camera_angle_notes: The oblique, off-center perspective and receding architectural lines create a dynamic visual path, emphasizing the artwork's physical presence and its harmonious integration within a refined creative space. The subtle angle reveals the canvas thickness, making it feel like a tangible object rather than a flat image.
contextual_proposals.human_presence: No visible people or animals. Human context expressed through architecture, culture, objects, season, and refined interior atmosphere.
contextual_proposals.curatorial_reason: This context places the abstract artwork in a setting that implies its origin and craftsmanship. The 'atelier clean wall' variant within an artist's studio environment, coupled with the 'corridor' camera, creates a sophisticated dialogue between the artwork's layered composition and the architectural depth, enhancing its artistic integrity and physical presence. It suggests a space where contemplation and creation coexist.
contextual_proposals.commercial_reason: By situating the artwork in a premium, authentic artist's studio environment, this proposal appeals to collectors who value artistic process, provenance, and refined aesthetics. The dynamic, off-center camera view, combined with the subtle studio traces, elevates the artwork's perceived value and visual interest, making it stand out from generic presentations. It presents the work as a substantial, professionally crafted piece destined for a discerning collector's space.
contextual_proposals.mockup_prompt: A clean artist's studio hallway, with a long, subtly textured plaster wall painted in a warm off-white, extending into the distance at an oblique angle. The abstract artwork, a vibrant canvas in deep blues, earthy browns, reds, and yellows, hangs off-center on this wall, positioned relatively close to the viewer at natural eye-level. The floor is polished light concrete, reflecting soft studio daylight. To one side, further back, a tall, narrow window allows gentle north light to filter in, casting subtle, long shadows and illuminating the subtle texture of the wall. Minimal, refined studio elements like a single, dark, architectural stool are positioned further down the receding corridor, out of primary focus, hinting at a creative workspace. The ceiling shows a glimpse of functional, soft studio lighting tracks, subtly receding into the background. The overall atmosphere is quiet, contemplative, and premium. The canvas's physical thickness and texture are clearly visible, with precise scale in relation to the architectural elements. No visible people or animals.

contextual_proposals.context_role: To position the artwork within a sophisticated, architecture-forward mid-century collector's environment, highlighting its depth and color resonance within a structurally modern setting.
contextual_proposals.space_type: A refined mid-century design collector's living area within a concrete loft, characterized by architectural recesses and a curated selection of period furniture.
contextual_proposals.atmosphere: Sophisticated, art-centric, and thoughtfully curated mid-century modern, with an underlying industrial-chic structure. The atmosphere is warm despite the concrete, featuring a subtle, inviting burgundy-toned spatial mood that complements the artwork's palette.
contextual_proposals.lighting: Filtered warm daylight entering from a large window, complemented by subtle, refined ambient lighting from a period floor lamp. The light is gentle, enhancing the artwork's colors without harsh reflections, creating a quiet luminosity within the burgundy-toned space.
contextual_proposals.camera_view: Borgoña Recovecos / Cámara 3/4 en Loft de Hormigón: Camera height is human but tucked into an architectural recess, approximately 120-160 cm depending on the loft edge. Use a 3/4 view from a recess, corner, or architectural edge, with a burgundy-toned spatial mood and one clean vanishing direction. The artwork is partially contextualized by loft recesses and concrete architecture, creating depth and intimacy without hiding the piece; allow strong off-center framing through recesses, corners, side planes, or architectural edges.
contextual_proposals.camera_distance: Controlled architectural distance, allowing the artwork to be central while revealing the depth and structure of the concrete loft and select mid-century design elements.
contextual_proposals.camera_angle_notes: The 3/4 oblique view from an architectural recess emphasizes the physical presence and thickness of the canvas. The deep perspective with clear vanishing lines highlights the artwork's scale within the sophisticated loft space, creating a sense of discovery and elegance, making the artwork feel integrated yet paramount.
contextual_proposals.human_presence: No visible people or animals. Human context expressed through architecture, culture, objects, season, and refined interior atmosphere.
contextual_proposals.curatorial_reason: The artwork's abstract forms and deep, rich color palette, particularly the interplay of blue, red, brown, and yellow, find a natural home in a mid-century setting that values clean lines, noble materials, and a curated aesthetic. The concrete loft structure provides a strong architectural backdrop, while the warm materials and burgundy accents create a visual dialogue with the artwork's specific colors, enhancing its sophisticated mood.
contextual_proposals.commercial_reason: This context elevates the artwork by presenting it within a highly desirable and architecturally significant mid-century environment. It appeals to collectors who appreciate design history and high-quality modern art, showcasing the artwork as a central, statement piece in a refined, yet structurally contemporary home. The distinct 'Burgundy Recovecos' camera perspective adds a premium, editorial quality, making the artwork more commercially compelling.

Exposed concrete elements frame the recess, with dark walnut wood paneling subtly incorporated on an adjacent wall, creating a foreground-to-background recession. A low-slung Mies van der Rohe Barcelona chair in deep burgundy leather is placed in the midground, subtly supporting the artwork without competing. The camera is positioned from an architectural recess or corner, capturing a 3/4 oblique view, with human eye-level, focused on the artwork as the dominant element, revealing the canvas thickness and the deep perspective of the concrete loft and mid-century furniture. The spatial mood has a subtle burgundy tone. No visible people, animals, or objects that detract from the artwork's focus.
